steps.title: Identify the conclusion signal
steps.content: The first sentence establishes that photogrammetry and polygonal modeling require handling thousands of shapes. The second sentence then concludes these approaches are therefore more economical than surface model methods, which require millions. The blank must signal this consequence.

steps.title: Match the consequence signal
steps.content: As such marks a consequence—the economical advantage in the second sentence flows from the fact that these methods require fewer shapes than alternatives. The other three choices misidentify the relationship as illustration, specification, or contrast. This matches choice C — C is correct.
